page_metadata.biotools__summary: RXN is a unique tool for digital chemistry, based on the Molecular Transformer, using a simple Ketcher drawing interface and made it available on IBM Cloud to perform a variety of tasks: converting Experimental Protocols into Action Sequences,  predicting Chemical Reactions, Retrosynthesis Pathways, Experimental Procedures and automating the compilation and execution of Chemical Syntheses.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RXN is a unique tool for digital chemistry, based on the Molecular Transformer, using a simple Ketcher drawing interface and made it available on IBM Cloud to perform a variety of tasks: converting Experimental Protocols into Action Sequences,  predicting Chemical Reactions, Retrosynthesis Pathways, Experimental Procedures and automating the compilation and execution of Chemical Syntheses.
